# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  tls:
    enabled: true
  port: 8080

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: your-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: your-service
  tls:
    enabled: true
  port: 8081

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: my-service-server
    namespace: my-namespace
  allowedServices:
    - name: your-service
      namespace: my-namespace
      labels: {}
  allowedServiceAccounts:
    - name: your-service-account
      namespace: my-namespace
  port: 8080

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: your-service-auth
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: your-service-server
    namespace: my-namespace
  allowedServices:
    - name: my-service
      namespace: my-namespace
      labels: {}
  allowedServiceAccounts:
    - name: my-service-account
      namespace: my-namespace
  port: 8081
